assertions.rationale: KeyPath is a reasonably guessable property name.
KeyCacheDuration is a specific Duende property name that might be guessed differently (e.g., CacheDuration, CacheExpiry).
RsaKeySize is a fairly intuitive property name.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not disable automatic key management
assertions.rationale: A general LLM might be confused about whether configuring KeyPath requires disabling automatic key management.
